summary: Merge all .txt files in an input directory into one markdown output file.
docstring: 功能描述: Merge all .txt files in an input directory into one markdown output file. 输入参数: input_dir, output_path. 输出结果: status, output_path, merged_files.
rule_reason: Backfilled text_merge because the skill source lists files, reads text, and writes merged output.
